final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input WE,
    input RE,
    input [3:0] D,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);
    reg [3:0] memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (WE) begin memory <= D ; // Write data to memory
  end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (RE) begin Q <= memory ; // Read data from memory
  end
  end
endmodule
